title: MikroTik Cloud Smart Switch CSS318-16G-2S+IN
description: The MikroTik Cloud Smart Switch CSS318-16G-2S+IN is a smart manageable switch with 16x Gigabit LAN ports and 2x SFP+ slots supporting 1, 2.5, and 10 Gbps. Its fanless design ensures silent operation. The switch can be installed in 10-inch racks, standard 19-inch racks, or even side-by-sideâfitting two switches in a single 1U 19-inch space.. Configuration is effortless with MikroTikâs SwOS operating system, which also allows advanced management with features like monitoring, port-to-port… 16x Gigabit LAN ports 2x SFP+ slots supporting 1, 2.5, and 10 Gbps Fanless silent operation Compact size Can be installed in a 10'' or 19'' rack Option to mount two switches in a single 1U 19'' rack Device Power cable Rack ears for 19'' rack
